LevelTwoChilds.description: The W3C technical report development process is the set of steps and requirements followed by W3C Working Groups to standardize Web technology.

LevelTwoChilds.title: adminlte
LevelTwoChilds.description: An open source admin dashboard & control panel theme. Built on top of Bootstrap 3, AdminLTE provides a range of responsive, reusable, and commonly used components.

LevelTwoChilds.title: flex-box
LevelTwoChilds.description: A showcase of problems once hard or impossible to solve with CSS alone, now made trivially easy with Flexbox.

LevelTwoChilds.title: jSchema data modeling

LevelTwoChilds.title: momentjs datetime model

LevelTwoChilds.title: Lottie
LevelTwoChilds.description: Lottie is a mobile library for Web, and iOS that parses Adobe After Effects animations exported as json with Bodymovin and renders them natively on mobile!
